title: glandularia aurantiaca var. glabra
intro: Glandularia aurantiaca var. glabra, also known as Rock Pink or Glabra Rock Pink, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Glandularia aurantiaca var. glabra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
